Mean Girls (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $72,581,770Details
International Box Office $32,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $104,581,770
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $372,640
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $561,162
Total $933,802
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Cady Heron moves to suburban Illinois after being home schooled in Africa, and wants to be popular. She takes on The Plastics and becomes frenemies with Regina George. But soon, she learns the hard way that you just shouldn’t mess with the Queen Bee.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$28,635,307 (39.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.53 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:69.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$36,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,791 opening theaters/3,826 max. theaters, 5.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $76,753,133

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 12th, 2024 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: January 10th, 2024 (Wide) (France)
January 10th, 2024 (Wide), released as Chicas Pesadas (Mexico)
January 10th, 2024 (Wide) (Switzerland (French Speaking))
January 11th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
January 11th, 2024 (Wide), released as Meninas Malvadas (Brazil)
Video Release: February 20th, 2024 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual material, strong language, and teen drinking.
(Rating bulletin 2815 (cert #54639), 1/3/2024)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): New Jersey, United States
Plot point: Bullies, High School Hell
Social setting: High School
Subgenre: Comedy Musical
Source:Based on Musical or Opera
Genre:Musical
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Broadway Video, Paramount Pictures, Little Stranger
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
